sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18432" key="a)folkh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφ-ολκή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18432.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">evacuation, depletion,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:1:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
